scripts.check: next typegen && tsc --noEmit && biome check --write . && eslint . --max-warnings 0 --fix
scripts.check:ci: next typegen && tsc --noEmit && biome check . && eslint . --max-warnings 0
scripts.test:ci: vitest run --coverage --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text --coverage.reporter json-summary --coverage.reporter json --coverage.reporter html --coverage.reportsDirectory ./coverage --coverage.all true --coverage.include 'app/**/*.{ts,tsx}' --coverage.include 'env.ts' --coverage.exclude '**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}' --coverage.exclude '**/*.d.ts'
